reason: Successfully tested agent functionality: navigated to the app, clicked target agent, verified status, sent a math question, received response mentioning "4".
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut application homepage with sidebar visible showing two agents.
Find and click agent "QA-20260619-224319-w3zy" in sidebar — Successfully clicked the agent link and navigated to the agent's detail page.
Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status is "idle" ✓
Send message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Successfully typed message in the input field and clicked the "Send message" button. Message submitted and session created.
Wait up to 3 minutes for response — Response received within ~5 seconds. The agent computed the answer quickly.

Verify response mentions "4" and take screenshot — Response is "2+2 = 4", which clearly contains "4". Screenshot taken and saved as response-screenshot.png showing the complete conversation in the chat view.
